title: Lava Detector
description: Lava Detector is a client mod that alerts players by displaying the exact distance to lava when the danger is within 20 blocks.
body:
### **🔥 Overview**

The Lava Detector Mod is a lightweight, client-side utility designed to increase player safety and awareness, particularly when mining deep underground, exploring the Nether, or traversing dangerous caves. It provides real-time, visual feedback showing the exact distance to the nearest lava source, allowing you to react quickly and avoid tragic mining accidents.

### **🌟 Features**

> Real-Time Detection: The mod continuously scans the area around the player, checking every block for stationary or flowing lava.

> Proximity Warning: The HUD warning only appears when the player is 20 blocks or closer to the nearest lava source, preventing screen clutter when traveling in safe areas.

> Dynamic Color Coding: The warning text changes color based on proximity:
  - Yellow/Orange: Lava is detected, but not immediately close (safe distance). 
  - Red: Lava is dangerously close (e.g., within 5 blocks), indicating immediate risk.

> Full Dimensional Support: Works perfectly in the Overworld, the Nether (where lava is abundant), and the End.

> Client-Side Only: This mod does not need to be installed on a server; it works purely on your computer.

### **⚙️ Configuration** (To be added)
_Future versions will include a configuration file to adjust the Detection Radius (default is 20 blocks) and the position of the HUD display._
